scripts.// tiering: eval:smoke (per-PR, non-gating) and eval:full (main/release, deploy-blocking) run the same Filipino spec until the annotated corpus lands in Story 2.6b-measure. IIP_EVAL_FULL is reserved for the future smoke/full branching (ADR-0025 §5). The Turbo eval:full task is pinned cache:false so releases re-execute from source.
